title: campium zeylanicum
intro: Campium zeylanicum, also known as Ceylon cinnamon or True Cinnamon, is a type of evergreen tree native to Sri Lanka that produces a highly valued spice, the inner bark of which is used as a culinary and medicinal ingredient. The medicinal properties of Campium zeylanicum include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Campium zeylanicum include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as providing antioxidant protection against chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Campium zeylanicum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and powder, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
